description_long: This is a stone sculpture mounted on a rectangular pedestal, depicting a robed human figure with one arm raised and holding a staff or scepter. The figure stands atop a cloud-like formation, with a cherubic or angelic child figure at its feet. The sculpture features intricate drapery and detailed facial expressions, suggesting a religious or historical theme. The pedestal is solid and weathered, with a broad base for stability. The surface of the sculpture is rough and aged, with visible discoloration and erosion typical of outdoor stone monuments. No visible signage or plaque is present in the images.
description: A weathered stone sculpture of a robed figure with a staff, standing on a pedestal with a cherubic child at its feet.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main robed figure with raised arm, staff, and the cherubic child at the base.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the drapery and the side profile of both figures.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the robed figure and the cloud-like base, with less detail on the faces.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile of the main figure and the child, with the staff visible.
attribute_subject_matter: robed human figure with staff and cherubic child
attribute_location_context: No clear environmental context is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a white background.
